race.comment: WONDER BOY (3) won't get too many better chances to notch up another victory on his home deck. He's been a bit frustrating having promised stakes level ability as a younger horse but put the writing on the wall last time at Rosehill when running on strongly for second to the smart Captain Furai. This looks very winnable and he should go close. TAUNG (11) is flying, winning narrowly fresh and good up to this grade at Caulfield when getting into third. Fancy 1600m third up is perfect, he'll just need a good ride from the gate. UNTIL VALHALLA (7) has no hope back off a pedestrian tempo at Caulfield last time and did as much as could be expected under her weight. Her best is good enough. OPENING ADDRESS (9) resumes. He got over further last time in but this is a good starting point. ANGRY SKIES (6) won the Warracknabeal Cup last time out and this doesn't look a whole lot harder.
